EQUIPMENT
Standard Power Packs These standard batteries are the cheapest ad most com- monly available Power Pack: The common power pack is small and easily stored_ typically the size of pistol"$ grip and carrying enough cnarge power most energy weapons for only few shots, Micro Power Pack: Designed for use in small hand-held devices this pack holds slightly ess charge than the standard power pack and Is about the size of coin. This compact design makes the Micro pack more expensive than the standard model; Milltary Power Pack: Military batteries hold the greatest charge and are also the largest, roughly the size of backpack. Satchel Battery: This holds much greater cnarge than the standard nand-held power pack: About tne size and weignt 0i full canteen; usually attached I0 bell Or combal vesl
assortment of field uniform accessories; Tew 0l tne most commonly used arc listed below.
PERSONAL ARMOR Several different types of armor are produced throughout known space_ each providing varying levels of protection. When choosing armor; cost is not the only factor to take into consid eration as the armors that provide the best protection are also the bulkiest and significantly limit mobility: On the other hand_ the lightest armors have Iittle impact on movement or dexterity and provide adequate protection   against   light pistois (and reduce the effectiveness of heavier weapons): Armor comes in number of styles_ The armored vest iIS probably the best known and most common; protecting only the wearer' torso, though some of the heavier vests fully cover the upper half of the body: with coverage extending down past the groin. Armored  jackets add arm protection; Armored pants cover tne lower extremilies overlapping coverage with the vest Or jackel at the waist: Armored suits provide the same protec: tion as the jacket and pants when Womn together; though the suits are often manufactured one single body suit. Helmets_ 0i course_ protect the head Stacking Atmort is acceptable t0 wear several pieces of armor at the same time and some cases these will overlap. The protection offered where the pieces overlap not added together but rather the best   protection of the individual pieces other words wearing two flak jackets won do much Eood, but wearing an ablative vest over flak suit will offer addi- tional protection from laser weapons that hit the torso_ In this case the armor values the torso would be   3/5/6/3_ Naturally; the weight of all armor worn added for encum- brance and no additional armor can be stacked the character IS wearing battle armor:
High-Capacity Power Packs High-capacity (HC) batteries which come the same vari" eties as standard packs; hold significantly larger charge Tney are ess common and more expensive
Rechargers Unless otherwise noted_ only one power pack can plugged into single recharger at any one time_ The recharger can provide up t0 the indicated number of power points per hour;   regardless how many power packs are attached_ Rechargers can be used as direct power sources, but they pro vide only limited supply per hour: FossIl Fuel Recharger: Utilizing petroleum fuel, the fossil fuel recharger is small two four-stroke engine that drives dynamo which turn cnarges the  battery: The   fossil fuel recharger can accommodate Up to three power packs Kinetic   Recharger: The  kinetic  recharger  works the same principle as the fossil fuel recharger, but instead of hav ing a engine t0 drive the dynamo instead needs t0 be man ually cranked: can accommodate Up t0 tnree power packs_ Solar Recharger: The most expensive Of its kind_ the solar recharger is also the most cost efficient. relies supply of ultraviolet light generated by solar system' $ primary star; It is fairly rare, and its usefulness may be restricted if the sun" that draws power from is often blocked by clouds (rending the solar recharger useless until the weather clears). The solar recharger accommodate up to five power packs, Standard Recharger: These plug into standard electri- outlet; drawing the power needed t0 recharge power pack from building's electrica service Heavy-Duty Recharger: heavy-duty recharger differs from the standard charger only in the fact that can accommodate up t0 five power packs at time
Flak Armor Designed to protect the wearer from small-arms fire flak armor notoriously ineffective   against  high-power ballistic rifles and lasers On the other hand_ flak armor is cheap, light- weignt and does Iittle to inhibit movement as I5 made of special cloth weave It is often used by people looking for pro tection on backwater worlds where there Iittle chance of going up against ayone with aser Or Other modern weapon: Flak armor comes as jacket, pants suit and vest.
Ablative Armor Ablative armor was developed in response to the prolifera: tion of laser weapons Consisting of thin ceramic ad compos- ite plates that are resistant t0 aser tire _ ablative armor provides Iittle protection against projectile weapons_ Ablative armor popularity has fallen since the introduction   of ablative /flak armor Ablative armor comes as jacket. pants_ suit and vest
